{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Chief Guardians
| species = Remnant
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The three [[Chief Guardians of Dreadnought City]] are Archlords with advanced [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Chief Guardians]]' [[Remnants]] include an eagle of lightning, a blue angular crystal creature, and a [[steel]] fusion of a crab and a praying mantis.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
